Package com.dtwthalion.ttio.transport

Class AccessUnit

java.lang.Object
com.dtwthalion.ttio.transport.AccessUnit
public final class AccessUnit extends Object
Transport-layer Access Unit: one spectrum as a transport payload.

Wire value for spectrumClass: 0=MassSpectrum, 1=NMRSpectrum, 2=NMR2D, 3=FID, 4=MSImagePixel, 5=GenomicRead (v0.11 M79).

Wire value for polarity (differs from Enums.Polarity which uses -1 for negative; the wire uses nonneg only): 0=positive, 1=negative, 2=unknown.
